title: Word2Vec Optimization
content:
# Word2Vec Optimization

## 1. Negative Sampling Loss
$$\mathcal{L} = -\ln \sigma(\mathbf{v}'^{\top}_{O} \mathbf{v}_{I}) - \sum_{j=1}^k \ln \sigma(-\mathbf{v}'^{\top}_{N_j} \mathbf{v}_{I})$$

## 2. Noise Distribution
$$P_n(w) \propto U(w)^{0.75}$$
*   Bumps rare word sampling probabilities to balance updates.
